name: Remote Suspicious Probe Events Detected
notes: Reports various suspicious or reconnaissance events from the same remote source IP address to more then 5 destination IP addresses in 4 minutes. This may indicate various forms of host probing, such as Nmap reconnaissance that attempts to identify the services and operating system of the targets.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 20 times
conditions_text: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 20 times, across more than 5 destination IP within 4 minutes
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 20 times, across more than 5 destination IP within 4 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote Suspicious Probe Events Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 20 times, across more than 5 destination IP within 4 minutes
AND NOT when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
AND when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
RED_list: Event name: Remote Suspicious Probe Events Detected

Event description: Detected   various suspicious or reconnaissance events from the same remote source IP address to more then 5 destination IP addresses in 4 minutes. This may indicate various forms of host probing, such as Nmap reconnaissance that attempts to identify the services and operating system of the targets.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 600 second(s)
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
